author: Brandt Tullis
content: Fantastic read, thanks! I appreciated the breakdown of “up/down” and the distinction between observability and monitoring.

author: Jean-Mark Wright
content: This was an exceptional article on the topic and really helped me visualize the difference between observability and monitoring. I’m anxious to digest part two! Thanks!
